# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the full branch diff against 2e54e84499c17f6d5cfafe87ff0d6ee5068770e8 across tracked source files (excluding runtime state in .ralph-burning and docs/artifacts). No high-confidence correctness or safety issues were identified in the implemented policy-order, config wiring, similarity matching, or journal event logging. The reviewed changes appear to satisfy the stated acceptance criteria; I did not find actionable defects to fix.

## Amendments

None.
